mano_cua.result_summary: 在iPhone模拟模式下，配置带location的事件后点击Google Calendar，description字段存在多余逗号。具体表现：原始description 'Play with me!' 后被附加 ','，location行前也有多余 ','。URL中details参数为 'Play+with+me!,...,%26%23128205;+123+Main+Street...'，解码后 description 第1行末尾和第3行开头各有一个多余逗号。location参数本身正确无多余逗号。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Description field has extra commas when location workaround is appended on iPhone UA: 'Play with me!,' and ',📍: 123 Main Street...'

deploy_notes: commit 3913a0ab0a. Nuxt demo on port 3000. Built library with grunt first.
